content.json:
# MDE Drift Report

All configuration drift across P0/P1/P2/P5/P7 categories, unioned and enriched with AuditLogs attribution.

content.title: Primary view
content.query: union (MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(7d, 1h) | extend Category = "P0 Config"), (MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(7d, 30m) | extend Category = "P1 Pipeline"), (MDE_Drift_P2Governance(7d, 1d) | extend Category = "P2 Governance"), (MDE_Drift_P5Identity(7d, 1d) | extend Category = "P5 Identity"), (MDE_Drift_P7Metadata(30d, 1d) | extend Category = "P7 Metadata") | summarize Changes = count() by Category, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render timechart

content.title: Drift / trend
content.query: union (MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(7d, 1h)), (MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(7d, 30m)), (MDE_Drift_P2Governance(7d, 1d)), (MDE_Drift_P5Identity(7d, 1d)), (MDE_Drift_P7Metadata(30d, 1d)) | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100
